citations.narrative:
The facility has not followed vaccination protocol outlined in the program of veterinary care. The facility has not
administered the rabies vaccine to approximately 28 adult dogs in accordance with the approved vaccination schedule.
The dogs are approximately 4 months overdue for the rabies vaccination. Failure to provide vaccinations on a schedule
approved by the attending veterinarian leads to an increased risk of contagious and/or deadly diseases in the dogs.
Correct by ensuring that vaccinations for contagious and/or deadly diseases in accordance with a schedule approved by
the attending veterinarian are implemented. Correct by, 20-May-2026.
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with a Facility Representative.
n

narrative:
3.13(a)(3) 
   
Veterinary care for dogs. 
The facility has not followed vaccination protocol outlined in the program of veterinary care. The facility has not 
administered the rabies vaccine to approximately 28 adult dogs in accordance with the approved vaccination schedule. 
The dogs are approximately 4 months overdue for the rabies vaccination. Failure to provide vaccinations on a schedule 
approved by the attending veterinarian leads to an increased risk of contagious and/or deadly diseases in the dogs. 
Correct by ensuring that vaccinations for contagious and/or deadly diseases in accordance with a schedule approved by 
the attending veterinarian are implemented. Correct by, 20-May-2026. 
 
This inspection and exit interview were conducted with a Facility Representative. 
 
 n
